## page_title: "k0s_versions Data Source - k0s" subcategory: "" description: |- Query available k0s versions from GitHub releases.

# k0s_versions (Data Source)

Query available k0s versions from GitHub releases.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "k0s_versions" "all" {}

output "latest" {
  value = data.k0s_versions.all.latest
}

output "versions" {
  value = data.k0s_versions.all.versions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Optional

- `include_prerelease` (Boolean) Include pre-release versions in the results. Defaults to false.
- `per_page` (Number) Number of releases to fetch from GitHub (max 100). Defaults to 10.

### Read-Only

- `latest` (String) Latest k0s version (latest stable, or latest prerelease if include_prerelease=true).
- `versions` (List of String) List of available k0s version strings.
